entities.name: relationship-building conversation
entities.context: Early-stage interaction type focused on connection and mutual understanding rather than transactional outcomes

entities.name: deal negotiation
entities.context: Contrasted with relationship-building; a different conversation mode to avoid in early interactions

entities.name: mutual recognition
entities.context: Key outcome where both parties acknowledge working on the same class of problem from complementary angles

relationships.context: Explicitly contrasted approaches; early conversations should be the former, not the latter
Mutual recognition is identified as the most important outcome of relationship-building conversations
